allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($n\){"node: "+$n.Source}else{"no node"}; $py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py\){"py: "+$py.Source}else{"no py"}; $px = \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($px\){"npx: "+$px.Source}else{"no npx"})
